source: handcrafted, hand-computed from fees.bandedRates.grocery (priceThreshold=$15, atOrBelowThreshold=8%) at $14. NOTE: first draft of this case wrongly expected verdict=pass, assuming failed roi/profit checks alone would sink it below the review threshold — the exam itself caught this: bsr/sales/offers/buybox still contribute 66/100 pts plus partial roi/profit credit, landing the real score at 75.4 (review). Fixed after independently re-deriving the full weighted score by hand.
